hero.title: Building Today's Algeria, the Foundation of Tomorrow, with Dignity and Pride
hero.subtitle: A national project placing citizens at the heart of development, aimed at strengthening national sovereignty, advancing the digital economy, and empowering youth in decision-making.

cards.title: Economic Dignity
cards.description: Improving citizens' purchasing power and supporting national production to reduce dependency on imports.

cards.title: Local Development
cards.description: Fair distribution of wealth among wilayas and empowering municipal councils with financial autonomy.

cards.title: Youth & Education
cards.description: Modernizing curricula, supporting startups, and aligning education with the modern job market.

cards.title: Accountability & Transparency
cards.description: Strengthening institutional oversight and guaranteeing citizens' right to access information and public data.

timeline.title: A Journey of Activism and Fieldwork
timeline.intro: Madame La Candidate has dedicated her life to public service through community engagement and purposeful political activism, believing that change begins with genuine will and shared action among all segments of Algerian society.
timeline.imageCaption: Fieldwork is the foundation of change

items.label: The Beginnings
items.description: Founded the 'Hope' association to support productive families in rural areas.

items.label: Municipal Work
items.description: Elected to the Municipal People's Assembly and headed the Social Affairs Committee.

items.label: Legislative Reform
items.description: Contributed to drafting laws protecting the rights of women and children.

items.label: New Horizons
items.description: Launched the 'Future Algeria' initiative to shape the features of the modern state.

items.title: 'The Hub' Incubator
items.description: Launching coding clubs in primary schools.

items.title: Empowering Women Entrepreneurs
items.description: Trained over 300 women in digital marketing and e-commerce.

items.title: Planting a Million Trees
items.description: A national reforestation initiative to combat desertification with civil society youth.

items.title: 'Warm Winter' Campaign
items.description: Distributed over 5,000 food and clothing packages to families in shadow areas.

footer.name: Madame La Candidate
footer.description: For a strong, prosperous, and just Algeria for all its children. Together, we make change.
